HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

dcmplx omega
 Angular frequency.
 

Detailed Description

Abstract base class for SIE formulations.

Derived classes (e.g., PMCHWT) implement the routines that assemble the system matrix and right-hand side using the provided RWG basis, Green's function back-end, and a list of incident fields.

Definition at line 31 of file SIEForm.h.

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

◆ SIEForm()

SIEForm::SIEForm ( std::vector< RWGFun > * inRWGFuns,
GreenF * inGrnFun,
std::vector< IncidentField * > * inIncFields,
dcmplx inVacWavelength )

Construct the SIE formulation context.

Stores pointers to basis functions, Green's function back-end, and incident fields. Computes the angular frequency from the given vacuum wavelength.

Parameters
inRWGFunsRWG basis function array (owned elsewhere).
inGrnFunGreen's function object (owned elsewhere).
inIncFieldsList of incident fields (owned elsewhere).
inVacWavelengthVacuum wavelength used to compute omega.

Member Function Documentation

◆ FillLSEMatrix()

virtual int SIEForm::FillLSEMatrix ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 2 > * matrix)
pure virtual

Assemble the system matrix \( \mathbf{A} \).

Populates the complex matrix used in the linear system \( \mathbf{A}\mathbf{x}=\mathbf{b} \). Derived classes must resize/fill matrix entirely.

Parameters
matrixOutput pointer to a 2D Blitz array to be filled.
Returns
0 on success; non-zero on error.

Implemented in SIEFormPMCHW.

◆ FillLSEMatrixAndGradient()

virtual int SIEForm::FillLSEMatrixAndGradient ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 2 > * matrix,
blitz::Array< dcmplx, 2 > * gradmatrix[3] )
pure virtual

Assemble system matrix and its gradient w.r.t.

geometry parameters.

Some inverse/design workflows require gradients of the operator with respect to three geometry parameters (e.g., dx, dy, dz). Derived classes must fill matrix and the three gradient matrices in gradmatrix.

Parameters
matrixOutput system matrix.
gradmatrixArray of three pointers to gradient matrices \((\partial Z / \partial p_i)\).
Returns
0 on success; non-zero on error.

Implemented in SIEFormPMCHW.

◆ FillLSEVector()

virtual int SIEForm::FillLSEVector ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 1 > * vector)
pure virtual

Assemble the right-hand side vector \( \mathbf{b} \).

Uses the incident fields and testing with the RWG basis to construct the excitation vector compatible with the chosen formulation.

Parameters
vectorOutput pointer to a 1D Blitz array to be filled.
Returns
0 on success; non-zero on error.

Implemented in SIEFormPMCHW.
